queryExamples: How much are we spending monthly?
Which vendors put us over budget?
What can we cut to get under budget?
notes: Confirmed from Gmail receipts and the subscription audit tracker; unresolved usage-based tools still require dashboard verification.
Recent quick enrollments/cancellations may make next-month realized spend lower than this snapshot.

transitionAdjustments.rationale: Claude Max appears in the current receipt-backed run-rate, but the ChatGPT switch should remove this line from the next settled cycle if cancellation remains in place.

apifyCallAnalysis.lastMonitorExecution: Direct provider refresh on 2026-05-27 was readable; sampled account-level Apify runs included 2026-05-20 and 2026-05-15 activity, with four succeeded and one failed status. Actor-level bakeoff evidence remains the active replacement-analysis base.
apifyCallAnalysis.nextAction: Keep productive evidence actors under watch, pause or replace no-run/failing/empty-output actors, and compare the remaining productive categories against cheaper alternatives before renewal.

googlePlacesPromotionGate.localKeyStatus: API-restricted to Places API (New); acceptable for the short local/Codex bakeoff window.
googlePlacesPromotionGate.productionRequirement: Do not promote Google Places as the durable Apify Google Maps replacement until the production runner and outbound egress path are confirmed.
requiredControls: Separate production key from the local bakeoff key.
IP address restriction if the production runner has stable outbound egress.
Strict quota limits, billing alerts, and a rotation review date if stable egress is not available yet.
Infisical/Vercel runtime sink sync only after the production key is approved.
Production-like rerun of npm run apify:replacement-bakeoff -- --run before replacing the Apify Google Maps actor.

actorRunHistory.label: Facebook friends
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Pause unless a campaign-owned Facebook source is explicitly active; browser/manual review is safer before re-enabling.

actorRunHistory.label: Facebook groups
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Pause by default and replace with manual group review or approved community exports if needed.

actorRunHistory.label: Facebook comments
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Pause unless a specific post-engagement campaign justifies a controlled run.

actorRunHistory.label: LinkedIn connections
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Replace or keep disabled; repeated failures with zero output make this a poor use of Apify.

actorRunHistory.label: LinkedIn post engagement
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Investigate input quality before keeping; success with zero items is not useful output.

actorRunHistory.label: Reddit listening
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Keep for now; run a bakeoff against Reddit API/RSS/search before replacing.

actorRunHistory.label: Google Maps
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Keep only if Google Places API or manual CSV cannot produce equivalent accepted evidence.

actorRunHistory.label: LinkedIn post search
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Keep as the strongest current Apify value signal; compare against browser-agent sampling.

actorRunHistory.label: G2 reviews
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Replace with manual/source-registered review capture unless the actor can return non-empty datasets.

actorRunHistory.label: Capterra reviews
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Keep only for targeted evidence collection; run a manual/browser-search replacement test.

actorRunHistory.label: Profile enrichment
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Remove from active watch if the older HeyGen cold-email flow is retired.

actorRunHistory.label: Website screenshot/video
actorRunHistory.recommendation: Replace with local Playwright/Browser Use/Vercel Chromium capture if website capture is still needed.

summary.headline: Daily refresh: Supabase, n8n, Vercel, Stripe, model providers, Slack, Apify, HeyGen, Pinecone, Printful, Hunter, ElevenLabs, and Read AI connector remain readable or active; OpenRouter and Vapi stayed quiet; no vendor reached the approval-ready cancellation threshold.
nextReviewFocus: Review ElevenLabs current-cycle zero usage against the next planned campaign before the 2026-06-19 reset.
Confirm OpenRouter role in the next media/model bakeoff before preparing any deprecation packet.
Verify Vapi dashboard billing and whether production voice UX should stay enabled.
Check Printful dashboard order history and decide whether both native stores remain active.
Verify whether production uses Resend or Gmail/n8n as the real outbound channel.
Check Pinecone billing/API traffic against Supabase/local RAG usage.
Restore or replace Calendly API access and rerun event-type usage checks.
Resolve Gemini/Google AI project/key status before relying on image/social workflows.
Continue the Apify actor-level replacement bakeoff by pausing weak surfaces before account-level changes.
Keep BuiltWith active during the outreach ramp and judge it only against lead-prep and conversion evidence.

vendors.name: Vapi
vendors.billingSignal: Dashboard billing still needs verification; VAPI_PRIVATE_KEY was present and the 2026-05-27 default call sample returned zero calls again; prior visible call remains 2026-04-30.
vendors.usageSignal: No meaningful current Vapi usage appeared again on 2026-05-27; local references remain, including optional website voice paths.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Voice/audit experience risk if production voice UX is enabled.
vendors.recommendation: Investigate billing and intended voice UX; prepare a deprecation packet only if dashboard spend exists and voice UX is not needed.
vendors.nextAction: Check Vapi dashboard billing and decide whether the voice path should stay enabled.

vendors.name: BuiltWith
vendors.billingSignal: Standing decision: keep active during the outreach/client-volume ramp despite being the largest tracked budget lever.
vendors.usageSignal: Usefulness should be judged against lead prep, audits, implementation strategies, proposals, client outcomes, and conversion evidence, not isolated repo activity.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Outreach and client-preparation enrichment may depend on stack data during ramp.
vendors.recommendation: Keep active during outreach ramp; reassess only after enough sales evidence exists.
vendors.nextAction: Compare BuiltWith-enriched work against actual sales prep and conversion outcomes.

vendors.name: Fireflies.ai
vendors.billingSignal: Already canceled per Vambah confirmation on 2026-05-01; no new paid-plan evidence appeared in this run.
vendors.usageSignal: Only one local reference remains; keep out of the active queue unless paid-plan evidence reappears.
vendors.recommendation: Keep out of active cancellation queue unless new paid-plan evidence appears.
vendors.nextAction: No action unless a new receipt, dashboard signal, or code dependency appears.

vendors.name: Vercel
vendors.billingSignal: Vercel CLI was authenticated as vsillah and listed current portfolio and portfolio-staging deployment activity on 2026-05-27.
vendors.usageSignal: Active production and staging hosting/deployment dependency; latest sampled listings showed queued/building activity plus ready deployments within the prior hour.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Core hosting, previews, production, and staging verification.
vendors.recommendation: Keep; use CLI evidence when connector auth is blocked or unavailable.
vendors.nextAction: Continue verifying both portfolio and portfolio-staging deployment contexts during merge/release work; re-poll separately when deployment state must be settled.

vendors.name: Printful
vendors.billingSignal: Printful API returned two native stores on 2026-05-27, but both sampled Supabase printful_sync_log tables remain empty.
vendors.usageSignal: Merch/store code and webhook references remain; no sync movement was observed in the 2026-05-27 database samples.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Merchandise/order fulfillment if the store strategy is active.
vendors.recommendation: Investigate dashboard order history and merchandise strategy before any deprecation decision.
vendors.nextAction: Check Printful dashboard orders and decide whether both native stores remain strategically active.

vendors.name: Resend
vendors.billingSignal: RESEND_API_KEY was absent locally on 2026-05-27; production env and billing were not verified.
vendors.usageSignal: Optional code/env/webhook references remain, but Gmail/n8n remains the visible outbound path in repo references.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Transactional email deliverability if Resend is enabled in production.
vendors.recommendation: Verify production env and billing before keeping as a paid dependency or removing code paths.
vendors.nextAction: Check Vercel production env/billing for Resend and confirm whether Gmail/n8n is the real outbound channel.

vendors.name: Pinecone
vendors.billingSignal: Pinecone API returned one ready serverless publications index on 2026-05-27; traffic and billing still need dashboard verification.
vendors.usageSignal: RAG references remain, and active infrastructure exists, but API traffic was not available from this read-only probe.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Publication/RAG search path if Pinecone remains the live vector store.
vendors.recommendation: Investigate billing/API traffic and compare with Supabase/local RAG replacement path.
vendors.nextAction: Check Pinecone usage/billing dashboard before any replacement or cancellation packet.

vendors.name: Apify
vendors.billingSignal: Prior $39 monthly receipt; account API readable on 2026-05-27 with sampled account-level runs including 2026-05-20 activity.
vendors.usageSignal: Current five-run sample had four succeeded runs and one failed run; actor-level bakeoff still supports pausing weak surfaces before considering account cancellation.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Lead enrichment, social listening, review capture, and actor-health workflows where alternatives are not yet proven.
vendors.recommendation: Keep account-level subscription; continue actor-level replacement bakeoff and disable weak surfaces first.
vendors.nextAction: Continue actor-level replacement bakeoff and disable weak surfaces before considering account cancellation.

vendors.name: Hunter.io
vendors.billingSignal: Hunter API reports Free plan on 2026-05-27 with 75 available calls and 50 used calls.
vendors.usageSignal: No paid-plan evidence; optional lead/contact enrichment only.
vendors.recommendation: Keep/watch; not a paid cancellation target unless paid-plan evidence appears.
vendors.nextAction: Recheck only if Hunter usage increases or paid-plan evidence appears.

vendors.name: OpenRouter
vendors.billingSignal: Current key returned usage 0 again on 2026-05-27; paid spend not confirmed.
vendors.usageSignal: Consecutive quiet key evidence remains, but dependency scope and active spend are not confirmed.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Potential model-router or bakeoff fallback; no current usage signal from the sampled key.
vendors.recommendation: Watch; prepare deprecation packet only after bakeoff and spend check.
vendors.nextAction: Confirm OpenRouter role in the next media/model bakeoff and verify active spend.

vendors.name: ElevenLabs
vendors.billingSignal: Active Creator subscription; 0 of 246,034 characters used in current cycle on 2026-05-27; next reset 2026-06-19.
vendors.usageSignal: Current cycle remains quiet; social/audio campaign dependency may still exist.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Voiceover/audio generation for social content and media campaigns.
vendors.recommendation: Watch through campaign decision before next reset.
vendors.nextAction: Review current-cycle zero usage against the next planned social/audio/video campaign before 2026-06-19.

vendors.name: Read.ai
vendors.billingSignal: Prior $20.98 Read Pro receipt; authenticated connector returned May meeting evidence on 2026-05-27.
vendors.usageSignal: Connector returned three May meetings, latest sampled 2026-05-26, so meeting-intelligence workflow remains active enough.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Meeting transcript, recap, and client-context workflows.
vendors.recommendation: Keep while meeting transcript workflow remains useful; use connector evidence rather than stale direct-token state.
vendors.nextAction: Continue using connector evidence as usage signal; refresh local direct token only if needed.

vendors.name: Calendly
vendors.billingSignal: Prior $12.75 Standard receipt; CALENDLY_ACCESS_TOKEN was absent locally on 2026-05-27.
vendors.usageSignal: Scheduling links/references and n8n Calendly triggers remain.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Discovery, onboarding, kickoff, progress, renewal, and delivery scheduling links.
vendors.nextAction: Restore or replace Calendly API access and rerun event-type usage checks.

vendors.name: Gemini / Google AI
vendors.billingSignal: Model-list check returned 403 again on 2026-05-27 because the key/project is blocked; billing not verified.
vendors.usageSignal: Social image workflow references remain; current key/project status is unusable from the sample.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Gemini/image generation and RAG chatbot experiments if still active.
vendors.recommendation: Investigate key/project status before relying on Gemini workflows.
vendors.nextAction: Resolve Google AI key/project permissions before depending on Gemini workflows.

vendors.name: Anthropic
vendors.billingSignal: Prior $106.25 Claude Max receipt; Anthropic model list readable on 2026-05-27 with 9 sampled models; expected to drop only if the ChatGPT switch holds.
vendors.usageSignal: Anthropic code and n8n fallback/eval references remain.
vendors.portfolioDependency: LLM fallback/evaluation paths and any Claude Max workflow still in use.
vendors.nextAction: Confirm whether the ChatGPT switch removed the Anthropic subscription line from the next settled cycle.

vendors.name: Figma / Paper / Excalidraw / Canva
vendors.billingSignal: No billing evidence was gathered in this repo/API run; repo references exist but do not prove paid Portfolio subscriptions.
vendors.usageSignal: Design/media references exist but do not prove active paid usage inside Portfolio.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Design artifacts, diagrams, and visual content workflows if active outside repo code.
vendors.recommendation: Investigate only if receipts, dashboard evidence, or active design-production needs appear.
vendors.nextAction: Check receipts or tool dashboards only when a design/media subscription appears in spend evidence.
